rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (ClarifyBot's function), shows where the draft drifts from it (mismatch between the contributions list and methods section), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (revised paragraph).
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (contradiction between contributions list and methods section) and marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (mismatch between contributions list and methods section).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason in the suggested revision.
